title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
